properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know he rescued my soul His blood has covered my sin I believe, I believe My shame He's taken away My pain is healed in his name I believe, I believe

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'll raise a banner My Lord has conquered the grave

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My redeemer lives My redeemer lives My redeemer lives My redeemer lives

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I know He's rescued my soul His blood has covered my sin I believe, I believe My shame He's taken away My pain is healed in His name I believe, I believe

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'll raise a banner 'Cause my Lord has conquered the grave

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You lift my burdens I'll rise with You I'm dancing on this mountain top To see your kingdom come
